The Warrens.description: Sharp metallic tang in the air. Arcane instruments misbehaving. Headaches reported.

Markets Infinite.description: The crowd heat and still air have produced an interesting smell in Taste of Worlds.

Sanctum Quarter.description: Arcane static crackles. Hair stands on end. Small objects drift.

Grand Forum.description: A hot updraft from the industrial levels. Dry and choking. Feels like opening an oven.

Guild Spires.description: Furnace output has overwhelmed the filters. Visibility poor. Breathing unpleasant.

Outer Wall.description: Pressure equalisation through narrow vents is producing an eerie whistle across the district.
